tasks.label: emulator: start multi
tasks.command: tmux kill-session -t emulators 2>/dev/null; tmux new-session -d -s emulators -x 220 -y 50 'DISPLAY=:1 /opt/android-sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Pixel8 -port 5554 -no-snapshot-load -no-audio -gpu swiftshader_indirect -no-metrics' && tmux split-window -h -t emulators 'DISPLAY=:1 /opt/android-sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Pixel8b -port 5556 -no-snapshot-load -no-audio -gpu swiftshader_indirect -no-metrics' && tmux attach -t emulators

tasks.label: deploy: android device
tasks.command: DEVICE=$(adb devices | awk '/\tdevice$/{print $1; exit}') && echo "Targeting: $DEVICE" && dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/SyncoStronbo/SyncoStronbo.csproj -t:Run -f net8.0-android -c Debug -p:AdbTarget=-s%20$DEVICE -p:AndroidAttachDebugger=true -p:AndroidSdbTargetPort=40993 -p:AndroidSdbHostPort=40993 -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=/opt/android-sdk -p:JavaSdkDirectory=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64 -p:EnableDiagnostics=True -p:EnableMauiXamlDiagnostics=True

tasks.label: deploy: emulator-5556 (no debug)
tasks.command: dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/SyncoStronbo/SyncoStronbo.csproj -f net8.0-android -c Debug -t:PackageForAndroid && adb -s emulator-5556 install -r ${workspaceFolder}/SyncoStronbo/bin/Debug/net8.0-android/com.companyname.syncostronbo-Signed.apk && adb -s emulator-5556 shell monkey -p com.companyname.syncostronbo -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
